sequenceDiagram(name = "LoginFlow") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val ui = lifeline(name = "LoginInterface")
    val auth = lifeline(name = "AuthenticationService")
    val db = lifeline(name = "UserDatabase")
    message(from = user, to = ui, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = ui, to = auth, label = "authenticate(credentials)")
    message(from = auth, to = db, label = "loadUserRecord()")
    reply(from = db, to = auth, label = "userRecord")
    message(from = auth, to = auth, label = "verifyPasswordHash()")
    reply(from = auth, to = ui, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = ui, to = user, label = "loginSuccess")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant LoginInterface
participant AuthService
participant UserDatabase

User -> LoginInterface : enterCredentials()
LoginInterface -> AuthService : authenticate(credentials)
AuthService -> UserDatabase : loadUserRecord()
UserDatabase --> AuthService : userRecord
AuthService -> AuthService : verifyPasswordHash()
AuthService --> LoginInterface : accessToken
LoginInterface --> User : loginSuccess
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant LoginInterface
  participant AuthService
  participant UserDatabase
  User->>LoginInterface: enterCredentials()
  LoginInterface->>AuthService: forwardCredentials()
  AuthService->>UserDatabase: loadUserRecord()
  UserDatabase-->>AuthService: userRecord
  AuthService->>AuthService: verifyPasswordHash()
  AuthService-->>LoginInterface: accessToken
  LoginInterface-->>User: loginSuccess

    val app = lifeline(name = "BankingApp")

    val accountDb = lifeline(name = "AccountDatabase")

}

@startuml
actor Client
participant "API Gateway" as Gateway
participant "Rate Limiter" as Limiter
participant "Backend Service" as Backend

loop up to 3 times
Client -> Gateway : requestData()
Gateway -> Limiter : checkQuota()
alt quota available
Limiter --> Gateway : quotaOk
Gateway -> Backend : forwardRequest()
Backend --> Gateway : data
Gateway --> Client : data
else quota exhausted
Limiter --> Gateway : quotaExceeded
Gateway --> Client : tooManyRequests
Client -> Client : waitBackoff()
end
end

sequenceDiagram
  actor A
  participant B
  participant C
  participant D
  loop up to 3 retries
    A->>B: requestData()
    B->>C: checkQuota()
    C-->>B: quotaStatus
    alt quota available
      B->>D: forwardRequest()
      D-->>B: data
      B-->>A: data
    else quota exhausted
      B-->>A: 429 Too Many Requests
      A->>A: waitBackoff()
    end
  end

    reply(from = limiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExceeded")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "429 TooManyRequests")
    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoff)")

    message(from = client, to = gateway, label = "requestData() [retry 1]")
    message(from = gateway, to = limiter, label = "checkQuota()")
    reply(from = limiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExceeded")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "429 TooManyRequests")
    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoff)")

    message(from = client, to = gateway, label = "requestData() [retry 2]")
    message(from = gateway, to = limiter, label = "checkQuota()")
    reply(from = limiter, to = gateway, label = "quotaExceeded")
    reply(from = gateway, to = client, label = "429 TooManyRequests")
    message(from = client, to = client, label = "wait(backoff)")

actor Customer
participant OrderService
participant Orchestrator
participant EventLog
participant WarehouseService
participant PaymentService
participant ShipmentService

Customer -> OrderService : placeOrder()
OrderService -> Orchestrator : createSaga(order)
Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("SagaStarted")
EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack

Orchestrator -> WarehouseService : reserveItems(order)
WarehouseService --> Orchestrator : reservationResult

alt goods available
    Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("ItemsReserved")
    EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack

    Orchestrator -> PaymentService : executePayment(order)
    PaymentService --> Orchestrator : paymentResult

    alt payment successful
        Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("PaymentCompleted")
        EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack

        Orchestrator -> ShipmentService : commissionShipment(order)
        ShipmentService --> Orchestrator : shipmentResult

        Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("ShipmentCommissioned")
        EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack
    else payment failed
        Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("PaymentFailed")
        EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack

        Orchestrator -> WarehouseService : cancelReservation(order)
        WarehouseService --> Orchestrator : cancellationConfirmed

        Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("ReservationCancelled")
        EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack
    end
else goods not available
    Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("SagaAborted")
    EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack
end

Orchestrator -> EventLog : logStep("SagaFinished")
EventLog --> Orchestrator : ack

Orchestrator --> OrderService : sagaResult
OrderService -> Orchestrator : destroy()
OrderService --> Customer : orderStatus()
@enduml

  participant EventLog

  OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: createSaga()
  SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: sagaInstance

  SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(started)
  EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack

  SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
  WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationResult

  alt items available
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(reserved)
    EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack

    SagaOrchestrator->>PaymentService: executePayment()
    PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: paymentResult

    alt payment successful
      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(paid)
      EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack

      SagaOrchestrator->>ShipmentService: commissionShipment()
      ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: shipmentResult

      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(shipped)
      EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack
    else payment failed
      SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
      WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: cancellationConfirmed

      SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(compensated)
      EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack
    end
  else items not available
    SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: logStep(aborted)
    EventLog-->>SagaOrchestrator: ack
  end

  SagaOrchestrator->>OrderService: teardownSaga()
  OrderService-->>SagaOrchestrator: destroyed

  OrderService-->>Customer: orderStatus

actor User

participant "Authorization Server" as AuthServer
participant "Session Store" as SessionStore
participant "Resource Server" as ResourceServer
participant "Audit Log" as AuditLog

Client --> User : redirect to authorization server

User -> AuthServer : request login (via browser redirect)
AuthServer -> SessionStore : create session
SessionStore --> AuthServer : session created
AuthServer --> User : deliver login form

User -> AuthServer : submit credentials

alt credentials valid
    AuthServer --> User : authorization code (redirect to callback)
    User -> Client : callback with authorization code

    Client -> AuthServer : exchange code for access token

    par concurrent audit logging

        AuditLog --> AuthServer : ack
    end

    AuthServer --> Client : access token

    opt scope includes profile
        Client -> ResourceServer : request user data (token)
        ResourceServer -> AuthServer : verify token
        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : token valid
        ResourceServer --> Client : user data
    end

    Client --> User : login successful

else credentials invalid
    AuthServer -> SessionStore : discard session
    SessionStore --> AuthServer : session discarded
    AuthServer --> User : error message
end

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "AUTOSAR_ECU") {

    // ---------- Hardware Layer ----------
    val commController = partDef(name = "Communication Controller", isAbstract = true)

    val canController = partDef(name = "CAN Controller", specializes = commController.id)
    val linController = partDef(name = "LIN Controller", specializes = commController.id)
    val ethController = partDef(name = "Ethernet Controller", specializes = commController.id)

    val cpuCore = partDef(name = "CPU Core")
    val ram = partDef(name = "RAM")
    val flash = partDef(name = "Flash Memory")

    val microcontroller = partDef(name = "Microcontroller") {
        part(name = "cpuCore", typeId = cpuCore.id)
        part(name = "ram", typeId = ram.id)
        part(name = "flash", typeId = flash.id)
        part(name = "canController", typeId = canController.id)
        part(name = "linController", typeId = linController.id)
        part(name = "ethController", typeId = ethController.id)
    }

    val hardwareLayer = partDef(name = "Hardware Layer") {
        part(name = "microcontroller", typeId = microcontroller.id)
    }

    // ---------- AUTOSAR BSW Layer ----------
    val bswModule = partDef(name = "BSW Module", isAbstract = true)

    val mcal = partDef(name = "MCAL", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val canStack = partDef(name = "CAN Communication Stack", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val ethStack = partDef(name = "Ethernet Communication Stack", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val osModule = partDef(name = "Operating System", specializes = bswModule.id)
    val watchdogModule = partDef(name = "Watchdog Manager", specializes = bswModule.id)

    val bswLayer = partDef(name = "BSW Layer") {
        part(name = "mcal", typeId = mcal.id)
        part(name = "canStack", typeId = canStack.id)
        part(name = "ethStack", typeId = ethStack.id)
        part(name = "os", typeId = osModule.id)
        part(name = "watchdog", typeId = watchdogModule.id)
    }

    // ---------- Application Layer ----------
    val vfb = partDef(name = "Virtual Functional Bus")

    val swc1 = partDef(name = "Software Component 1")
    val swc2 = partDef(name = "Software Component 2")
    val swc3 = partDef(name = "Software Component 3")

    val applicationLayer = partDef(name = "Application Layer") {
        part(name = "vfb", typeId = vfb.id)
        part(name = "swc1", typeId = swc1.id)
        part(name = "swc2", typeId = swc2.id)
        part(name = "swc3", typeId = swc3.id)
    }

    // ---------- ECU Top-Level ----------
    val ecu = partDef(name = "ECU") {
        part(name = "hardwareLayer", typeId = hardwareLayer.id)
        part(name = "bswLayer", typeId = bswLayer.id)
        part(name = "applicationLayer", typeId = applicationLayer.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "AUTOSAR ECU BDD") {
        include(ecu)
        include(hardwareLayer)
        include(microcontroller)
        include(cpuCore)
        include(ram)
        include(flash)
        include(commController)
        include(canController)
        include(linController)
        include(ethController)
        include(bswLayer)
        include(bswModule)
        include(mcal)
        include(canStack)
        include(ethStack)
        include(osModule)
        include(watchdogModule)
        include(applicationLayer)
        include(vfb)
        include(swc1)
        include(swc2)
        include(swc3)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatellite") {
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)

    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera", specializes = payloadInstrument.id)
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar", specializes = payloadInstrument.id)

    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "opticalCamera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "sarRadar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    val structureThermalSubsystem = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control Subsystem") {
        part(name = "primaryStructure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "solarPanels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "heatShield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PDU")

    val electricalPowerSubsystem = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply Subsystem") {
        part(name = "batteryArray", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "solarPowerRegulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }

    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    val aocsSubsystem = partDef(name = "AOCS Subsystem") {
        part(name = "starSensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "reactionWheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    val ttcSubsystem = partDef(name = "TT&C Subsystem") {
        part(name = "onBoardComputer", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "rfTransmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rfReceiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    val satellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payloadSubsystem", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structureThermalSubsystem", typeId = structureThermalSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "electricalPowerSubsystem", typeId = electricalPowerSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "aocsSubsystem", typeId = aocsSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "ttcSubsystem", typeId = ttcSubsystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(satellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(structureThermalSubsystem)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(electricalPowerSubsystem)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(aocsSubsystem)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(ttcSubsystem)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}
